'Refund order 1 to the payment method I used for order 2. And refund order 2 to the one I used for order 1.'

[Agent explains cross-refunds are not allowed — refunds must go to the original payment method]
'Are you f***ing serious? What the f**k? That makes no sense at all. S**t.'
'...'
'Fine. Get me a human representative. Right now.'
